title: Yomiko Bernese Mountain Dog (Small)
features: Suki Gifts Yomiko Classics, Dogs - Small Bernese Mountain Dog
Black, white and tan soft caress plush toy with airbrushed details to the face
Part of the Yomiko Classics lifelike animals collections
description: Product Description Supersoft plush small Bernese Mountain Dog from Suki International Gifts' famous Yomiko Classics Dog collection. Premium quality soft boa plush dog with realistic features, soft fur and airbrushed details. Yomiko Classics are a world famous brand offering a broad collection of realistically styled animals, many of which are uniquely enhanced with air brushed features.Approximately 5 inches (12.7 cm) high. Suitable for all ages. Hand wash and air dry. Other sizes and friends also available in the Yomiko Classics range of sitting and lying Cats, Dogs and Jungle animals. Please remove all tags before giving this to a child. Suki Gifts are an innovative British company, providing high quality gifts and soft toys including Baby, Teddy Bears, Plush toys, Mugs, Piggy Banks and much more. Box Contains 1 x Small Bernese Mountain Dog
